params.value: SELECT Id, Name, ManagerId, Manager.Name, UserRole.Name FROM User WHERE IsActive = true AND (Name IN ({{JS_Config.managerNames().map(function(n){return "'" + n + "'"}).join(',')}}) OR ManagerId IN (SELECT Id FROM User WHERE IsActive = true AND Name IN ({{JS_Config.managerNames().map(function(n){return "'" + n + "'"}).join(',')}}))) ORDER BY ManagerId, Name LIMIT 200

CUSTOM_ACTION.path: query/?q=SELECT Id, Name, ManagerId, Manager.Name, UserRole.Name FROM User WHERE IsActive = true AND (Name IN ({{JS_Config.managerNames().map(function(n){return "'" + n + "'"}).join(',')}}) OR ManagerId IN (SELECT Id FROM User WHERE IsActive = true AND Name IN ({{JS_Config.managerNames().map(function(n){return "'" + n + "'"}).join(',')}}))) ORDER BY ManagerId, Name LIMIT 200
